book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. LUKE

verses.text: And he said also unto his disciples, \+w There was\+w* \+w a certain\+w* \+w rich\+w* \+w man\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w had\+w* \+w a steward\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w the same\+w* \+w was accused\+w* \+w unto him\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w he had wasted\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w goods\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he called\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w How is it\+w* \+w that I hear\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thee\+w*? \+w give\+w* \+w an account\+w* \+w of thy\+w* \+w stewardship\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w thou mayest be\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w longer\+w* \+w steward\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w the steward\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w within\+w* \+w himself\+w*, \+w What\+w* \+w shall I do\+w*? \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w lord\+w* \+w taketh away\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w the stewardship\+w*: \+w I cannot\+w* \+w dig\+w*; \+w to beg\+w* \+w I am ashamed\+w*.

\+w I am resolved\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w to do\+w*, \+w that\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w I am put out\+w* \+w of the stewardship\+w*, \+w they may receive\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w houses\+w*.

\+w So\+w* \+w he called\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of his\+w* \+w lord’s\+w* \+w debtors\+w* \+add unto him\+add*, \+w and said\+w* \+w unto the first\+w*, \+w How much\+w* \+w owest thou\+w* \+w unto my\+w* \+w lord\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w*, \+w An hundred\+w* \+w measures\+w* \+w of oil\+w*. \+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Take\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w bill\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w sit down\+w* \+w quickly\+w*, \+w and write\+w* \+w fifty\+w*.

\+w Then\+w* \+w said he\+w* \+w to another\+w*, \+w And\+w* \+w how much\+w* \+w owest\+w* \+w thou\+w*? \+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w*, \+w An hundred\+w* \+w measures\+w* \+w of wheat\+w*. \+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w Take\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w bill\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w write\+w* \+w fourscore\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w the lord\+w* \+w commended\+w* \+w the unjust\+w* \+w steward\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w he had done\+w* \+w wisely\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of this\+w* \+w world\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w generation\+w* \+w wiser\+w* \+w than\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of light\+w*.

\+w And I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Make\+w* \+w to yourselves\+w* \+w friends\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w the mammon\+w* \+w of unrighteousness\+w*; \+w that\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w ye fail\+w*, \+w they may receive\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w everlasting\+w* \+w habitations\+w*.

\+w He that\+w* \+w is faithful\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w that which is least\+w* \+w is faithful\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w much\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w unjust\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the least\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w unjust\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w much\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w been\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the unrighteous\+w* \+w mammon\+w*, \+w who\+w* \+w will commit\+w* \+w to your\+w* \+w trust\+w* \+w the true\+w* \+add riches\+add*?

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w been\+w* \+w faithful\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w is another man’s\+w*, \+w who\+w* \+w shall give\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w is your own\+w*?

¶ \+w No\+w* \+w servant\+w* \+w can\+w* \+w serve\+w* \+w two\+w* \+w masters\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w either\+w* \+w he will hate\+w* \+w the one\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w love\+w* \+w the other\+w*; \+w or else\+w* \+w he will hold to\+w* \+w the one\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w despise\+w* \+w the other\+w*. \+w Ye cannot\+w* \+w serve\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w mammon\+w*.
And the Pharisees also, who were covetous, heard all these things: and they derided him.

And he said unto them, \+w Ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w they which\+w* \+w justify\+w* \+w yourselves\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w men\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w God\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w hearts\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w is highly esteemed\+w* \+w among\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w abomination\+w* \+w in the sight\+w* \+w of God\+w*.

\+w The law\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the prophets\+w* \+add were\+add* \+w until\+w* \+w John\+w*: \+w since\+w* \+w that time\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w* \+w is preached\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w every man\+w* \+w presseth\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w it\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w easier\+w* \+w for heaven\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w to pass\+w*, \+w than\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w tittle\+w* \+w of the law\+w* \+w to fail\+w*.

\+w Whosoever\+w* \+w putteth away\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w marrieth\+w* \+w another\+w*, \+w committeth adultery\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w marrieth her\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w is put away\+w* \+w from\+w* \+add her\+add* \+w husband\+w* \+w committeth adultery\+w*.

¶ \+w There was\+w* \+w a certain\+w* \+w rich\+w* \+w man\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w was clothed\+w* \+w in purple\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w fine linen\+w*, \+w and fared\+w* \+w sumptuously\+w* \+w every\+w* \+w day\+w*:
\+w And\+w* \+w there was\+w* \+w a certain\+w* \+w beggar\+w* \+w named\+w* \+w Lazarus\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w was laid\+w* \+w at\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w gate\+w*, \+w full of sores\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w desiring\+w* \+w to be fed\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w the crumbs\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w fell\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the rich man’s\+w* \+w table\+w*: \+w moreover\+w* \+w the dogs\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and licked\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w sores\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w it came to pass\+w*, \+w that the beggar\+w* \+w died\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w was carried\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the angels\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w Abraham’s\+w* \+w bosom\+w*: \+w the rich man\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w died\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w was buried\+w*;

\+w And\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w hell\+w* \+w he lift up\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w eyes\+w*, \+w being\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w torments\+w*, \+w and seeth\+w* \+w Abraham\+w* \+w afar off\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w Lazarus\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w bosom\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w cried\+w* \+w and said\+w*, \+w Father\+w* \+w Abraham\+w*, \+w have mercy\+w* \+w on me\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w send\+w* \+w Lazarus\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he may dip\+w* \+w the tip\+w* \+w of his\+w* \+w finger\+w* \+w in water\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cool\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w tongue\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w I am tormented\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w flame\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w Abraham\+w* \+w said\+w*, \+w Son\+w*, \+w remember\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w lifetime\+w* \+w receivedst\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w good things\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w Lazarus\+w* \+w evil things\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w now\+w* \+w he\+w* \+w is comforted\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+w art tormented\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w beside\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w this\+w*, \+w between\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w there is a great\+w* \+w gulf\+w* \+w fixed\+w*: \+w so that\+w* \+w they which\+w* \+w would\+w* \+w pass\+w* \+w from hence\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w cannot\+w*; \+w neither\+w* \+w can they pass\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w us\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+add would come\+add* \+w from thence\+w*.
\+w Then\+w* \+w he said\+w*, \+w I pray\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w therefore\+w*, \+w father\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w thou wouldest send\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w father’s\+w* \+w house\+w*:

\+w For\+w* \+w I have\+w* \+w five\+w* \+w brethren\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w he may testify\+w* \+w unto them\+w*, \+w lest\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w place\+w* \+w of torment\+w*.
\+w Abraham\+w* \+w saith\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w They have\+w* \+w Moses\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*; \+w let them hear\+w* \+w them\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w*, \+w Nay\+w*, \+w father\+w* \+w Abraham\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w went\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w them\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the dead\+w*, \+w they will repent\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w he said\+w* \+w unto him\+w*, \+w If\+w* \+w they hear\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w Moses\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w will they be persuaded\+w*, \+w though\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w rose\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the dead\+w*.
